sys_script_include.description:
2.8.5 | 2024-10-15 - STRY0155210 - Defect - Template form~ Selecting a primary assignee restricts subtask primary assignee options to only top task primary assignee 2.8.4 HF | 2024-04-17 - DFCT0012402 - With open matrix setting ~ Run template is not allowing assigned member and reviewer field to be changed 2.8.3 | 2023-07-09 - raj - DFCT0012050 - Stretch & known issue-Faceted Search shows OUs and Users from Private OUs when the user is searching from an Open OU. (All OUs are available to be selected) 2.8.3 | 2023-07-02 - raj - DFCT0012071 - EH, defect: When creating a personal template as a TM, all permissive OU members are available for selection in the "select all" assignment fields (EX: Reviewer 2.8.3 | 2023-06-25 - raj - DFCT0012041 - Permissive OUs not included correctly in list of users that can be tasked 2.8.3 | 2023-06-06 - raj - DFCT0011930 - Global Hierarchy Admins in a Private OU can see and modify all OUs even open OUs. The Private OUs cannot be seen by users in an Open OU (good thing) 2.8.3 | 2023-06-05 - raj - DFCT0011926 - In New Task/Subtask Form, choosing an Assigned Member while the Primary Assignee is empty does NOT auto-populate to the Default OU of the Assigned Member 2.8.3 | 2023-06-05 - raj - DFCT0011927 - ONLY Global Template~ if a TA empties the primary assignee field, the choice list of Assigned Member becomes empty. 2.8.3 | 2023-05-29 - raj - DFCT0011892 - Using Divisional Setting, on OU templates, TMs can clear the Primary Assignee and then select any user from their OUs Tasking Pattern in the Assigned member 2.8.x | 2023-05-22 - raj - DFCT0011848 - With Organizational Privacy turned On ~Top OU DTCOM > "Organization unit is Open". is NOT receiving the Task from a Private OU CE. 2.8.x | 2023-05-12 - raj - DFCT0011850 - With Organizational Privacy turned on > Global Templates > clear the "Primary Assignee > different private OU member are displaying "Reviewer", "Assigned Member 2.8.x | 2023-05-12 - raj - DFCT0011849 - On new template form~ Adding an Assigned Member is clearing the Primary Assignee field
2.8.x | 2023-05-04 - raj - STRY0139614 - Modify Task Assignment with a Private OU - Selecting Users for users not dependent on Primary Assignee 2.8.x | 2023-05-04 - raj - STRY0139615 - Modify Template Assignment with a Private OU - Selecting Users for users not dependent on Primary Assignee 2.8.x | 2023-05-04 - raj - STRY0139616 - Modify Template Assignment with a Open OU - Selecting Users for users not dependent on Primary Assignee 2.8.x | 2023-05-04 - raj - STRY0139617 - Modify Task Assignment with a Open - Selecting Users for users not dependent on Primary Assignee 2.8.x | 2023-05-04 - raj - STRY0139618 - Modify Task Assignment with a Private - Selecting Primary Assignee Office 2.8.x | 2023-05-04 - raj - STRY0139619 - Modify Template Assignment with a Private OU - Selecting Primary Assignee
2.8.1 | 2022-10-27 - raj - STRY0131148 - Add New Table for Tasker User in preparation for Out of Office 2.8 | 2022-09-12 | raj | DFCT0011319 - "OU Templates" should NOT display all members in the "Assigned Member field" for the Task Manager. If they selected a "Primary Assignee" 2.7.2 | 2021-11-26 | raj | DFCT0010754 - "Subtask Primary Assignee" field is NOT showing correct filters when there is an "Assigned Member" 2.7.2 | 2022-01-20 | raj | DFCT0010767 - Setting an OU to "Permissive" causes "Task" and "Template" form filters for "Task User/Personal Template Designer" role to be incorrect
2.7.104 | 2022-01-07 | raj | DFCT0010747 - External OU are NOT displaying in the "Tasking Authority", "External OU" fields on Task and Template
2.7.1 | 2021-11-26 | raj | STRY0114393 - Task Forms- Assigned Member- Add new constraint logic 2.7.1 | 2021-11-26 | raj | STRY0114396 - Task Forms- Primary Assignee- Add new constraint logic 2.7.1 | 2021-12-11 | raj | DFCT0010669 - Tasks in Banner notifications does NOT redirect to the correct portal page configured in "Task Form Preference"
v2.7 STRY0095102 - HHS/ICE: The "Task" form and "Template" form field filters should account for users that have a "Parent" (Restricted) Group STRY0096033 - Remove restriction group type hardcode sysid in Tasker STRY0111621 - Task Forms - New Constraint for selecting "Reviewers" and "On Behalf Of" STRY0112587 - ICE-CMS- Task Executive- Permissions/Capabilities STRY0112462 - HHS- Strong Matrix- Permissive OU Tasking- Task Form
v 2.6 STRY0099013 - change filter for Task Owner v 2.5 P3 STRY0084270 - Restricted Group - Task Form - OU, Member and Contact fields should filter based on "Restricted Group" selected STRY0084273 - Restricted Group - Template - OU, Member and Contact Field Filters based on "Restricted Group" selected v 2.5.16 P2 - STRY0078831 - Added getAllMembersSysIdsInGroup: function(groupName) to address issue with Get subtask members for Administrator users v2.5.13 - Get Contacts for OU based on whether it is internal or external OU.
sys_script_include.name: taskerDynamicFilters
